topStories.title: Congress says Pradyut Bordoloi’s exit ‘unfortunate’, accuses BJP of poaching its leaders
topStories.description: Priyanka Gandhi Vadra says differences over ticket allocation may have triggered Bordoloi’s exit. MP Manickam Tagore says a traitor who switches sides in the middle of the battlefield cannot escape the judgment of the people.

dailyNews.title: FBI is buying location data to track US citizens, director confirms
dailyNews.description: FBI director Kash Patel told lawmakers that the agency is actively purchasing commercially available location data, which can track Americans without needing a warrant.

dailyNews.title: Assam Congress weighs MP’s flight to BJP
dailyNews.description: The fate of Pradyut Bordoloi’s son, the Congress candidate from eastern Assam’s Margherita constituency, hangs in the balance

dailyNews.title: Could the Iran war trigger a global recession?
dailyNews.description: Energy prices are surging as the Iran war disrupts supply, raising risks for the US, China and Europe.

dailyNews.title: US, Israel 'Must Pay': Mojtaba Khamenei Vows Revenge For Larijani's Killing
dailyNews.description: While Mojtaba remains away from the public eye, Iran has not spoken about his well-being, giving rise to speculations.

dailyNews.title: US Fed Keeps Interest Rates Unchanged For Second Time At 3.5%-3.75%
dailyNews.description: At its last meeting, the Federal Reserve kept its policy interest rate steady in the 3.50%-3.75% range.

dailyNews.title: Trump temporarily waives century-old shipping law amid rising fuel costs
dailyNews.description: Lifting the Jones Act temporarily allows foreign ships to transport cargo across the US, but critics question efficacy.

dailyNews.title: Who will answer for the Iranian schoolchildren killed in Minab?
dailyNews.description: An investigation finds the Minab school strike may have been deliberate. Who can hold the US accountable?

dailyNews.title: BRS could fade like Janata Party, says Revanth
dailyNews.description: It will be a resounding victory for Congress in 2029, says CM

dailyNews.title: 'Threat To Global Energy Security': UAE, Qatar On South Pars Gas Field Attack
dailyNews.description: Iran had threatened to target oil facilities in UAE, Saudi Arabia and Qatar after the South Pars gas field in the Islamic Republic was attacked by the US and Israel.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan Among Biggest Nuclear Threats To US: Intel Chief Tulsi Gabbard
dailyNews.description: US intelligence chief Tulsi Gabbard also pointed to growing cooperation between North Korea, Russia and China on strategic capabilities.

dailyNews.title: Iran's intelligence minister Esmail Khatib killed in air strike
dailyNews.description: Israel said it had killed Khatib, whose death was confirmed by Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian on Wednesday.

dailyNews.title: Congress says Pradyut Bordoloi’s exit ‘unfortunate’, accuses BJP of poaching its leaders
dailyNews.description: Priyanka Gandhi Vadra says differences over ticket allocation may have triggered Bordoloi’s exit. MP Manickam Tagore says a traitor who switches sides in the middle of the battlefield cannot escape the judgment of the people.

dailyNews.title: President or Congress? Who in the US has the power to declare war?
dailyNews.description: US presidents have long bypassed Congress's authority and dissenting lawmakers have often tried to fight back.

dailyNews.title: Iran Intel Minister Esmail Khatib killed in strikes, confirms Israel President — who was he?
dailyNews.description: Iran's president Masoud Pezeshkian branded intelligence minister Esmail Khatib's death a “cowardly assassination.”

dailyNews.title: BJP urges traditional Ugadi celebrations to strengthen community bonds
dailyNews.description: Visit prominent temples in villages across districts and actively participate in the celebrations along with local communities, says party State president

dailyNews.title: US Republican Senator John Cornyn introduces Bill to end ‘special treatment’ for lawmakers at airports
dailyNews.description: The proposed End Special Treatment for Congress at Airports Act would mandate that lawmakers follow standard screening rules set by the Transportation Security Administration and prohibit the use of federal funds for expedited or preferential access at airport checkpoints.

dailyNews.title: Middle East conflict: Russia and Iran 'are brothers in hatred'; long war benefits Putin, says Zelenskyy
dailyNews.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has said the war in Iran is helping Russian President Vladimir Putin, since the energy prices have soared. He said Putin wanted a ‘long war’ between the US, Israel, and Iran.

dailyNews.title: Assam Congress chief Gogoi calls Pradyut Bordoloi’s exit ‘unfortunate’
dailyNews.description: Nagaon MP Pradyut Bordoloi quits Congress, joins BJP; Gogoi says party backed him, calls decision personal but unfortunate

dailyNews.title: How Los Angeles’s Iranian diaspora is confronting the US war on Iran
dailyNews.description: Residents are divided between supporting and opposing the US and Israeli war against Iran, amid fears for loved ones.

dailyNews.title: Social Security recipients eye 2027 COLA outlook. Federal Reserve March 18 meeting in focus
dailyNews.description: The official COLA announcement will be made in October, but the March 18 Fed meeting is seen as an early checkpoint for retirees tracking their future purchasing power.

dailyNews.title: Trump wants to overthrow the Cuban president
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration says it wants to remove Cuba’s President Miguel Diaz-Canel by the end of the year.

dailyNews.title: King Charles greets Nigerian president in Windsor sunshine
dailyNews.description: The King and President Tinubu will give speeches later at the state banquet, to be attended by political leaders and celebrities.

dailyNews.title: Ricki Lake admits she ‘impulsively’ got facelift without research after 40-pound weight loss
dailyNews.description: Ricki Lake opens up about her facelift decision and slams Hollywood stars who lie about cosmetic procedures. She advocates for honesty about surgery.

dailyNews.title: Former Assad-era prison chief convicted of torture in US federal court, marking a historic first
dailyNews.description: Samir Ousman Alsheikh, a former Syrian prison chief, was found guilty in the U.S. of torture and immigration fraud charges, becoming the first Assad-era official convicted in an American court.

topStories.title: Sen Mullin gets emotional recounting Trump's kindness to his son
topStories.description: Sen. Markwayne Mullin fought back tears during his confirmation hearing as he revealed how President Donald Trump supported his family after his son's brain injury.

topStories.title: Progressive influencer erupts after Illinois primary loss, drops profane anti-Trump, -ICE rant
topStories.description: Progressive candidate Kat Abughazaleh delivered an expletive-filled concession speech after losing the Illinois Democratic primary, targeting President Donald Trump and ICE.

topStories.title: Ossoff questions Gabbard about Iran posing an 'imminent nuclear threat'
topStories.description: Sen. Jon Ossoff, D-Ga., questioned Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard whether intelligence showed Iran posed a "imminent nuclear threat" as the White House had previously said to justify the ongoing conflict.

topStories.title: Alan Dershowitz plans to seek Trump pardon for ‘orgasmic meditation’ leaders awaiting federal sentencing
topStories.description: As two leaders of OneTaste — a sex-focused women’s wellness company centered on “orgasmic meditation” — await sentencing after being convicted on federal charges, attorney Alan Dershowitz told NBC News he plans to lobby President Donald Trump to pardon them.“I believe this is a miscarriage of justice,” Dershowitz said in a recent interview.

dailyNews.description: Sen. Jon Ossoff, D-Ga., questioned Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard whether intelligence showed Iran posed a "imminent nuclear threat" as the White House had previously said to justify the ongoing conflict.

dailyNews.title: Alan Dershowitz plans to seek Trump pardon for ‘orgasmic meditation’ leaders awaiting federal sentencing
dailyNews.description: As two leaders of OneTaste — a sex-focused women’s wellness company centered on “orgasmic meditation” — await sentencing after being convicted on federal charges, attorney Alan Dershowitz told NBC News he plans to lobby President Donald Trump to pardon them.“I believe this is a miscarriage of justice,” Dershowitz said in a recent interview.

dailyNews.title: Iran lashes out with missiles as Israel says war still intensifying
dailyNews.description: Iran retaliates for Israel's latest assassinations as President Trump and Israeli leader Benjamin Netanyahu give no indication the war is about to let up, 19 days in.

dailyNews.title: Watch: Sen. Bennet and CIA director Ratcliffe clash over goals of Iran war
dailyNews.description: Sen. Michael Bennet sparred with CIA Director John Ratcliffe about the Trump administration's goals with the Iran war. "The defined goals are very clear," Ratcliffe said, which Bennet disagreed with. "The complete lack of clarity should matter to everybody," the senator said.

dailyNews.title: Why NATO isn't jumping to help Trump with Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump has continued to bash U.S. allies for not joining the effort to secure the Strait of Hormuz amid the escalating war with Iran. Niall Ferguson, senior fellow at the Hoover Institution, joined CBS News to discuss.

dailyNews.title: Top Trump counterterrorism official resigns over Iran war
dailyNews.description: President Trump's director of the National Counterterrorism Center, Joe Kent, announced his immediate resignation Tuesday, citing the administration's decision to intervene in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump hasn't decided on sending Americans after Iran's nuclear material, sources say
dailyNews.description: The Pentagon has prepared multiple options for President Trump as potential next steps in the Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Trump hasn't decided on sending troops into Iran to seize nuclear material, sources say
dailyNews.description: President Trump hasn't made up his mind yet on sending U.S. troops to Iran to seize the country's nuclear material, sources tell CBS News. CBS News' Ed O'Keefe reports.

dailyNews.title: U.S. Intelligence Saw No Change in Iran’s Missile Capabilities Before War
dailyNews.description: On Wednesday, the director of national intelligence and C.I.A. director contradicted one of the justifications the Trump administration had given for its attacks on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump Suspends Jones Act to Ease Oil Shipping Rules and Gas Price Pressures
dailyNews.description: The Jones Act dictates that only U.S.-made ships can move cargo between U.S. ports. They charge customers more for shipping than foreign vessels.

dailyNews.title: The Cost of the A.I. Boom: A Trade Deficit the President Detests
dailyNews.description: A recent surge of A.I.-related imports has become an impediment to the smaller trade deficit President Trump wants.

dailyNews.title: Mullin Signals He Would End Noem Policy That Slowed Disaster Aid
dailyNews.description: The president’s nominee, Markwayne Mullin, said he would avoid “micromanaging” FEMA.

dailyNews.title: NYC High School Student Freed After 10 Months in ICE Detention
dailyNews.description: The arrest of Dylan Lopez Contreras last year was the first reported case of a public school student in the city being taken by federal immigration agents since President Trump returned to office.

dailyNews.title: Stratton, Illinois Senate Primary Winner, Promises a ‘Fight’ With Trump
dailyNews.description: Ms. Stratton, a Democrat whose viral campaign ad featured voters’ profane views of Mr. Trump, said her campaign’s aggressive messaging was resonating.
